rows: You were the illegitamate eldest daughter of Catherine and Peter. Even though they were married in 1712, this unfortunate fact kept you from the crown. You were denied the title of Tsesarevna(crown princess) and given the lesser title of Tsarevna(princess). You were made for greatness. You accepted your fate gracefully, married and had a child. Your Swedish husband the Duke was cruel and bitter after being expelled from Russia thus changing you from sweet and shy person you once were. The puerperal infection after childbirth would have claimed your life had your sire not snatched you from the jaws of death. You took to your new life as if you were made for it. You were taken to Constantinople and tought the ways of kindred. You travelled wherever needed providing the resources to support efforts of the clan. You influencedd history to make certain your child Peter ruled Russia as Peter III regaining for your line what was stolen. Your bloodline and ruthless efficiency awarded you elder status a century early. As the modern nights approached the thirst for acquisition and business accumen swelled. You made yourself even more rich from seeing weakness and capitalizing on it. You continue to provide finance and backing to the Ventrue being named Tribune for your efforts. At times you needed to be physically intimidating as well and learned some basic combat. You have been sent to add resources to further give support to the war effort and to regain honor for the Ventrue in Los Angeles
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
Basically the herd is people on her investment consulting business which she has done background checks on for birth circumstances

records.staff_generated_concept: You were the illegitamate eldest daughter of Catherine and Peter. Even though they were married in 1712, this unfortunate fact kept you from the crown. You were denied the title of Tsesarevna(crown princess) and given the lesser title of Tsarevna(princess). You were made for greatness. You accepted your fate gracefully, married and had a child. Your Swedish husband the Duke was cruel and bitter after being expelled from Russia thus changing you from sweet and shy person you once were. The puerperal infection after childbirth would have claimed your life had your sire not snatched you from the jaws of death. You took to your new life as if you were made for it. You were taken to Constantinople and tought the ways of kindred. You travelled wherever needed providing the resources to support efforts of the clan. You influencedd history to make certain your child Peter ruled Russia as Peter III regaining for your line what was stolen. Your bloodline and ruthless efficiency awarded you elder status a century early. As the modern nights approached the thirst for acquisition and business accumen swelled. You made yourself even more rich from seeing weakness and capitalizing on it. You continue to provide finance and backing to the Ventrue being named Tribune for your efforts. At times you needed to be physically intimidating as well and learned some basic combat. You have been sent to add resources to further give support to the war effort and to regain honor for the Ventrue in Los Angeles

Finding a talented graphic artist and paying him or her handsomely to implicate Zimmer in unsavory situations and stay silent about their involvement, done anonymously by phone (100k)
2 economics to tie up Zimmer's funds as Finance influence
Hiring security and doing a personal patrol (2 actions)

Economics-1. investigation of Nathaniel Johnson's debts (expect an assist from Trip) paying minimums to buy us time of approximately $68k. 2. Setting up protected Swiss type account with $400k to set aside to fund domain defense.
Assisting Trip in doing computer action looking into same Johnson issues from this angle
researching ways to contact the gentleman we met from the Pentex board-Michael (I am available all week)
Reserving a con action to assist with Fortier if that is planned even if that is hiring people/dominate help
Defend Long Beach, patrol for defense strength

Downtime securing the harbor master as underworld . 2 Economics 1 to defend and 1 to check current market conditions and optimize investments (check on resources 6 to see what will be available for Gio/London debt. Wire as necessary)
Underworld 1(harbor master), Elite 1(investment firm), mental trait
Plot items via harbor-see underworld. Defense numbers via investment firm
2 million to Gio fund, 2 to Eli business plan. See expenditures
harbor master monitoring shipments into Long Beach for suspicious activity from outside sources.
Monitoring own computer for malware and adware
Spending 2 regular actions on South LA via Dominate. Spending 3 con actions for same. (5 total defense actions)
Investment firm keeping an eye on Long Beach via chamber of commerce asking for business climate/ police reports
Calling sire and those attached to Olson to determine state of Praxis
